hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams consolidate case data, audit evidence, and regulatory triggers into clear reports that support efficient board-level review and audit readiness.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling

trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Internal reporting depends on manual workflows
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to prepare consistent board-level reports due to disconnected case data and scattered audit evidence. This fragmentation slows escalation, complicates suspicious activity review, and weakens traceability across regulatory reporting requirements.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates alerts, case actions, decision logs and evidence into one structured workflow so compliance teams can generate consistent, audit-ready board-level reports with full traceability.
workflow_description: SFTY organizes alerts from multiple compliance providers into structured cases with documented decisions and preserved evidence for internal reporting and audit.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented reports. Clear compliance control
why_sfty_description: SFTY transforms scattered internal data into structured cases, decisions and evidence, providing compliance teams with clear operational visibility for board-level reporting and audit readiness.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASP compliance teams with structured evidence, provider orchestration, bank due diligence and controlled deployment to meet rigorous internal and external reporting standards.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: Ask SFTY how to prepare board-level compliance reports
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how case workflows support suspicious activity review
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence links to internal compliance reports
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how regulatory rule changes update compliance reporting
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for board compliance reporting?
faq_1_answer: SFTY helps compliance teams prepare board-level reports by connecting alerts, cases, regulatory triggers and evidence into one structured operational layer for clearer oversight and audit readiness.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY structure internal compliance workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY organizes compliance inputs into workflows that route cases, capture decisions, link evidence, and escalate issues, reducing manual work and improving consistency across internal reporting processes.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history and evidence packages in audit-ready formats, enabling traceable internal reviews and supporting regulator or board inspection preparation.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates outputs from KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into connected workflows without disrupting existing vendor relationships or data sources.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT, or screening providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but sits above them, structuring their outputs into actionable workflows, cases, evidence and reports for digital asset compliance teams.
final_description: Review how SFTY organizes case data, evidence and regulatory triggers into audit-ready reports for board-level compliance oversight.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
